query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT acctInId) FROM WP_M09.dbo.WP_vAcctIn WHERE LEFT(acctInId, 6) = '202601' AND isDel = 'N';

query: SELECT WarehouseName, SUM(qty) FROM WP_M09.dbo.WP_vInventory GROUP BY WarehouseName;
